svg.title: Patient admission workflow — dev and production
svg.desc: Full workflow from patient registration through vitals streaming, for both dev and production environments.
svg.text: PHASE 1 — patient registration (same in dev and prod)

g.text: Fills admission form in React UI
1. Saves Patient row → gets DB id (e.g. 7)

svg.text: PHASE 2 — bed assignment (same in dev and prod)

g.text: Fetches patient list from Spring Boot / FHIR

svg.text: PHASE 3 — vitals streaming (dev vs prod differ here)

g.text: Reads patient list, streams vitals by fhirId
Streams vitals directly to Spring Boot
Pushes via WebSocket → Kafka → ML models
